title: Doctor JSON returns structured diagnostics
description: Black-box smoke for the structured doctor surface using an isolated temporary ARMATURE_HOME.
input: Run `armature doctor --json` with a temporary local environment and verify the output still includes project, provider, and git diagnostics.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_HOME=$(mktemp -d); env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_HOME" ARMATURE_HOME="$TMP_HOME/.armature" ARMATURE_PROVIDER=openai OPENAI_API_KEY=test-openai-key node dist/bin/armature.js doctor --json'
